configurations.name: web-static
runtimeArgs: import os, http.server, socketserver; os.chdir('web'); port=int(os.environ.get('PORT','8000')); h=http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler; h.protocol_version='HTTP/1.0'; srv=socketserver.ThreadingTCPServer(('127.0.0.1', port), h); srv.allow_reuse_address=True; print(f'serving web/ on {port}', flush=True); srv.serve_forever()
